_meta.description: Difficulty rating for each deployable slot. 1-10 scale. Factors: guest interaction, physical demand, area complexity, traffic volume. Updated through conversation only.

Admin.notes: Supervisory duties, most complex role, high accountability

Zone1.notes: High guest interaction, pit area, covers Zone 1+2 RR on weekdays

Zone2.notes: Pit area, lobby visibility, covers Zone 1+2 RR on weekdays

Zone5.notes: High Limit table games, elevated guest expectations

Zone6.notes: Lower traffic, often slow on weekdays

Zone7.notes: Lower traffic, often slow on weekdays

Zone9.notes: Smoking room complexity, social bar, high physical demand

Zone10.notes: High Limit slots, outdoor area, pit 4

Zone9SR.notes: Direct smoking room assignment, ventilation, physically demanding

MRR1.notes: Zone 1+2 area, high traffic on weekends

WRR1.notes: Zone 1+2 area, high traffic on weekends

MRR6.notes: Moderate traffic, also covers Zone 6 on weekdays

WRR6.notes: Moderate traffic, also covers Zone 6 on weekdays

MRR8.notes: Multiple locations: Family RR, TDR, TMBR Locker Room

WRR8.notes: Multiple locations: Family RR, TDR, TMBR Locker Room

Trash1.notes: Lobby area sweep, moderate physical demand

Trash2.notes: Lobby area sweep, moderate physical demand
